description: A hands-on course on hardening Kubernetes workloads through SecurityContext. Covers the principle of least privilege applied to containers: non-root execution, privilege escalation prevention, read-only filesystems, Linux capability management, and seccomp profiles.
target_audience: Intermediate developers and platform engineers who are already comfortable writing Pod and Deployment manifests and are applying container security hardening for the first time.

lectures.title: Building Least-Privilege Containers with Kubernetes SecurityContext
